scripts.start: npm run flutter-build && npm run flutter-relocate && npm run abap2ui5-build && npm run abap2ui5-relocate && react-scripts start
scripts.test: npm run test-react && npm run test-sapui5 && npm run test-flutter && npm run test-abap2ui5
scripts.test-abap2ui5: cd src/abap2ui5 && npm run webpack:build && npx playwright test
scripts.flutter-relocate: rm -rf public/flutter && mkdir -p public/flutter && cp -r src/flutter_ui/build/web/* public/flutter/ && rm -rf public/assets && mkdir -p public/assets && cp -r src/flutter_ui/build/web/assets/* public/assets/
scripts.abap2ui5-build-ghp: cd src/abap2ui5 && cross-env PUBLIC_URL=/timofei-bazhukov-portfolio/abap2ui5/ npm run wp-build-prod
scripts.abap2ui5-build-prod: cd src/abap2ui5 && cross-env PUBLIC_URL=/timofei-bazhukov-portfolio/abap2ui5/ npm run wp-build
scripts.abap2ui5-relocate: rm -rf public/abap2ui5 && mkdir -p public/abap2ui5 && cp -r src/abap2ui5/build/* public/abap2ui5/
scripts.build-prod: npm run flutter-build && npm run flutter-relocate && npm run abap2ui5-build-prod && npm run abap2ui5-relocate && npm run build
scripts.build-ghp: npm run flutter-build && npm run flutter-relocate && npm run abap2ui5-build-ghp && npm run abap2ui5-relocate && npm run build
